zh.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy於大約1047年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福。她於1068年之前與Urse d'Abetot在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1123年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾格亞特 馬爾福格亞特 馬爾福 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy于大约1047年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福。她于1068年之前与Urse d'Abetot在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1123年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾格亞特 馬爾福格亞特 馬爾福 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Normandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Normandin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy was born about 1047, in Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. She married Urse d'Abetot before 1068, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1123, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Great Malvern Priory, Great Malvern, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandyは約1047年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメル ハvアで生まれた。1068年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでUrse d'Abetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1123年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで78歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアグレアト マルバーングレアト マルバーン プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Great Malvern Priory, Great Malvern, Wor: 영국 워스스터실르 그리트 맬버 그리트 맬버 플리오리
ko.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy(은)는 대략 1047년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 일 하브르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1068년 이전 영국 워스스터실르에서 Urse d'Abetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 그리트 맬버 그리트 맬버 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy nasceu aproximadamente 1047, em Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Ela casou-se com Urse d'Abetot antes 1068, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Great Malvern Priory, Great Malvern, Wor: грит малвирн приори, грит малвирн, ворсестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Athelisa de Normandy родилась около 1047 г. в местности л хавр, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Urse d'Abetot перед 1068 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1123 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности грит малвирн приори, грит малвирн, ворсестиршир, Англия.
